name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cookie crumbs and butter; press mixture onto bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake the crust for 10 minutes.
4. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt caramels and evaporated milk together on high for 4-5 minutes, stirring every minute.
5. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the baked crust.
6. Sprinkle pecans evenly over the top of the cheesecake batter.
7. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended.
8. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
9. Blend in melted chocolate chips and vanilla extract.
10. Pour the mixture over the pecans.
11. Place the pan on a cookie sheet for stability during baking.
12. Bake the cheesecake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
13. Remove the cake from the pan and cool before serving.
14. Store the cheesecake in the refrigerator.
15. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
